calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Margaret De Matteo, Esq., for the Plaintiff
Luisa Cabrera sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Susan Lawrence.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 34 Sixth Street, Room 518 San Francisco, CA 94103.
Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
for a Judgment of Possession of the premises.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Luisa Cabrera
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Susan Lawrence DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Nov 18, 2013 remains on calendar.(D501)
